projects.title: HireHub - Full Stack Job Portal
projects.description: Built a full-stack job portal web application where recruiters can post and manage job listings, and job seekers can browse opportunities, apply online, and track applications. The platform includes role-based authentication, protected dashboards for recruiters and candidates, job filtering/search, application status management, and resume upload support.
techStack: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, React Router, Axios, Framer Motion, Node.js, Express.js, Sequelize, PostgreSQL, JWT, bcrypt, Cloudinary, cookie-parser, CORS, ESLint, Nodemon.

projects.title: Email Tracking Pixel API
projects.description: A backend service using Node.js to track email opens using transparent pixels and logging recipient data.

projects.title: Modern Portfolio Template
projects.description: A highly responsive portfolio website with dynamic JSON-based data rendering and custom animations.
